paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc is 6.12 as of 2026-07-20, representing a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. There have been no new news articles about the company in the last 24 hours.

Recent news articles have discussed the company's financial situation, including a 486 million dollar loss and zero revenue, as well as the departure of a director due to governance concerns. The company has also completed a 375 million dollar offering of convertible senior notes. Some articles have questioned whether the stock is overvalued, while others have noted that retail traders remain bullish on the company's long-term prospects.

There have been several recent SEC filings from Fermi Inc, including a Schedule 13G filing on 2026-07-20 and multiple 8-K filings related to the company's convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed, but no Form 144 filings.
